TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Sugamiya Katsutarou == Sugamiya Katsutarou , Ibaragiken tamdaw no Dipong, nao kakeridan no Singko siting (Madawdaw no Posong) , Posong telekay iing : 225, kakeridan kalekapoan no Singko : 64, misa'icel patireng to minato no Singko ato pipalalan : 225. 'Oripan Masofoc ci Sugamiya Katsutarou i 1883 miheca 6 folad 24 romi'ad i Kamisu-shi no Dipong, 1903 miheca micomod i Konoe kohei daitai saka 2 hikotai, saka 2 miheca maocor mala Rikugun kohei ichi tohei, ikor malakakeridan, maocor tayra i Dairen, Pyon'yan itiya . I 1906 miheca malatapang no hitay, toya miheca mapakaolah to saka 8 liyad no mizutakara kunshō o juyo , i 1907 miheca 7 folad 4 romi'ad4): 142 malakakeridan no imeng no Pingtong, 1910 miheca malamidamaan tapang no kakeridan no imeng , saan itira i Tongkang, Alikang, Fangsang, Ciasien a kasasiiked no imeng, itira i Nance no Takao midemakay, i 1919 miheca 8 folad mapacakat Keisatsusho : 446 : 142, saan i 1916 miheca 4 folad mapakaolah to saka 7 liyad no mizutakara kunshō o juyo . Nanoya i 1922 miheca 11 folad 7 romi'ad citodong to kakeridan no Singko : 142 , misa'icel misalalan nai Singko tangasa Posong a lalan, mitahidang to kasaniyaro' a yincumin patireng to amoto a kayakay, malaheci i, pasi'amis to tayra i Kakacawan, Kaladot a lalan : 446 . Nanoya masasowasowal to no Singko ci Matsui Kinjiro, Folalacay ci Uma Sakae Do, Posko ci Miyahara Sa, Matsuo Bun Nanji a Soncho maaini, nanay mapalalan ko no Tetsudo (cilamalay) lalan tangasa i Singko, ato mapalalan milakecay to lotok a karomakatan lalan. Onini a nisahalakaan masafaloco' no kafafaw itiya, nika cidemak to kalaloodan no Dipong, saka caayay ka laheci konini : 446–447 . I 1932 miheca, ira ko tilid to sapilinah ci Sugamiya Katsutarou tayra i roma niyaro' i, caay sakalinahaw saka liyas sato cingra tonini a tayal, ikor no 1937 miheca 10 folad : 142 maparocek cingra mala citodongay no Posong telekay iing : 225, saka itini sato i Singko ko nika'orip : 225, itini i Congsanlo mapatireng ko loma' : 446–447. I 1939 miheca 8 folad, mikotay ci Obi han jo shima malaChan-chan no Singko . I 1943 miheca adada cingra a mapatay, mapatay cingra midotoc to nirootan to katadem i Singko, i 1974 miheca o teloc ningra tayniay mita'ong to tadem. I 1990 miheca malopipatirengan to pitilidan to Cengkong suican kaoci congsi nasa toya pitademan a milinah to tadem ni Sugamiya Katsutarou i, itiya mapohed ko okak ato takenip masapinang itiya, awaayto ko kacipinangan : 447 Pikidatan
S.PHON: == so~u~u*amija katso~u~utaro~uo~u~u == so~u~u*amija katso~u~utaro~uo~u~u , ib~b~vara*ikən tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nao~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u siŋko~u sitiŋ (maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw no~u po~uso~uŋ) , po~uso~uŋ təɾəkaj iiŋ : ***, kakəriɬ~ɮan kaɾəkapo~uan no~u siŋko~u : **, misaʡiʦəɾ patirəŋ to~u minato~u no~u siŋko~u ato~u pipaɾaɾan : ***. ʡo~uripan maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi so~u~u*amija katso~u~utaro~uo~u~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i kamiso~u~u-sħi no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, **** miħəʦa miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ko~uno~uə ko~uħəi ɬ~ɮaitai saka * ħiko~utai, saka * miħəʦa mao~uʦo~ur maɾa riko~u~u*o~u~un ko~uħəi iʦħi to~uħəi, iko~ur maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan, mao~uʦo~ur tajra i ɬ~ɮairən, pjo~unʡjan itija . i **** miħəʦa maɾatapaŋ no~u ħitaj, to~uja miħəʦa mapakao~uɾaħ to~u saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ no~u mi*o~u~utakara ko~u~unsħ* o~u jo~u~ujo~u , i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ*): *** maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u iməŋ no~u piŋto~uŋ, **** miħəʦa maɾamiɬ~ɮamaan tapaŋ no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u iməŋ , saan itira i to~uŋkaŋ, aɾikaŋ, faŋsaŋ, ʦiasiən a kasasiikəɬ~ɮ no~u iməŋ, itira i nanʦə no~u takao~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mapaʦakat kəisatso~u~usħo~u : *** : ***, saan i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mapakao~uɾaħ to~u saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ no~u mi*o~u~utakara ko~u~unsħ* o~u jo~u~ujo~u . nano~uja i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u siŋko~u : *** , misaʡiʦəɾ misaɾaɾan nai siŋko~u taŋasa po~uso~uŋ a ɾaɾan, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kasanijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~u~umin patirəŋ to~u amo~uto~u a kajakaj, maɾaħəʦi i, pasiʡamis to~u tajra i kakaʦawan, kaɾaɬ~ɮo~ut a ɾaɾan : *** . nano~uja masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u no~u siŋko~u ʦi matso~u~ui kinjiro~u, fo~uɾaɾaʦaj ʦi o~u~uma sakaə ɬ~ɮo~u, po~usko~u ʦi mijaħara sa, matso~u~uo~u b~b~vo~u~un nanji a so~unʦħo~u maaini, nanaj mapaɾaɾan ko~u no~u tətso~u~uɬ~ɮo~u (ʦiɾamaɾaj) ɾaɾan taŋasa i siŋko~u, ato~u mapaɾaɾan miɾakəʦaj to~u ɾo~uto~uk a karo~umakatan ɾaɾan. o~unini a nisaħaɾakaan masafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u kafafaw itija, nika ʦiɬ~ɮəmak to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka ʦaajaj ka ɾaħəʦi ko~unini : ******* . i **** miħəʦa, ira ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u sapiɾinaħ ʦi so~u~u*amija katso~u~utaro~uo~u~u tajra i ro~uma nijaro~uʡ i, ʦaaj sakaɾinaħaw saka ɾijas sato~u ʦiŋra to~unini a tajaɾ, iko~ur no~u **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ : *** maparo~uʦək ʦiŋra maɾa ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u po~uso~uŋ təɾəkaj iiŋ : ***, saka itini sato~u i siŋko~u ko~u nikaʡo~urip : ***, itini i ʦo~uŋsanɾo~u mapatirəŋ ko~u ɾo~umaʡ : *******. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, miko~utaj ʦi o~ub~b~vi ħan jo~u sħima maɾaʦħan-ʦħan no~u siŋko~u . i **** miħəʦa aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ʦiŋra a mapataj, mapataj ʦiŋra miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u niro~uo~utan to~u kataɬ~ɮəm i siŋko~u, i **** miħəʦa o~u təɾo~uʦ niŋra tajniaj mitaʡo~uŋ to~u taɬ~ɮəm. i **** miħəʦa maɾo~upipatirəŋan to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan to~u ʦəŋko~uŋ so~u~uiʦan kao~uʦi ʦo~uŋsi nasa to~uja pitaɬ~ɮəman a miɾinaħ to~u taɬ~ɮəm ni so~u~u*amija katso~u~utaro~uo~u~u i, itija mapo~uħəɬ~ɮ ko~u o~ukak ato~u takənip masapinaŋ itija, awaajto~u ko~u kaʦipinaŋan : *** pikiɬ~ɮatan
S.FORM: == Sugamiya Katsutarou == Sugamiya Katsutarou , Ibaragiken tamdaw no Dipong, nao kakeridan no Singko siting (Madawdaw no Posong) , Posong telekay iing : 225, kakeridan kalekapoan no Singko : 64, misa'icel patireng to minato no Singko ato pipalalan : 225. 'Oripan Masofoc ci Sugamiya Katsutarou i 1883 miheca 6 folad 24 romi'ad i Kamisu-shi no Dipong, 1903 miheca micomod i Konoe kohei daitai saka 2 hikotai, saka 2 miheca maocor mala Rikugun kohei ichi tohei, ikor malakakeridan, maocor tayra i Dairen, Pyon'yan itiya . I 1906 miheca malatapang no hitay, toya miheca mapakaolah to saka 8 liyad no mizutakara kunshō o juyo , i 1907 miheca 7 folad 4 romi'ad4): 142 malakakeridan no imeng no Pingtong, 1910 miheca malamidamaan tapang no kakeridan no imeng , saan itira i Tongkang, Alikang, Fangsang, Ciasien a kasasiiked no imeng, itira i Nance no Takao midemakay, i 1919 miheca 8 folad mapacakat Keisatsusho : 446 : 142, saan i 1916 miheca 4 folad mapakaolah to saka 7 liyad no mizutakara kunshō o juyo . Nanoya i 1922 miheca 11 folad 7 romi'ad citodong to kakeridan no Singko : 142 , misa'icel misalalan nai Singko tangasa Posong a lalan, mitahidang to kasaniyaro' a yincumin patireng to amoto a kayakay, malaheci i, pasi'amis to tayra i Kakacawan, Kaladot a lalan : 446 . Nanoya masasowasowal to no Singko ci Matsui Kinjiro, Folalacay ci Uma Sakae Do, Posko ci Miyahara Sa, Matsuo Bun Nanji a Soncho maaini, nanay mapalalan ko no Tetsudo (cilamalay) lalan tangasa i Singko, ato mapalalan milakecay to lotok a karomakatan lalan. Onini a nisahalakaan masafaloco' no kafafaw itiya, nika cidemak to kalaloodan no Dipong, saka caayay ka laheci konini : 446–447 . I 1932 miheca, ira ko tilid to sapilinah ci Sugamiya Katsutarou tayra i roma niyaro' i, caay sakalinahaw saka liyas sato cingra tonini a tayal, ikor no 1937 miheca 10 folad : 142 maparocek cingra mala citodongay no Posong telekay iing : 225, saka itini sato i Singko ko nika'orip : 225, itini i Congsanlo mapatireng ko loma' : 446–447. I 1939 miheca 8 folad, mikotay ci Obi han jo shima malaChan-chan no Singko . I 1943 miheca adada cingra a mapatay, mapatay cingra midotoc to nirootan to katadem i Singko, i 1974 miheca o teloc ningra tayniay mita'ong to tadem. I 1990 miheca malopipatirengan to pitilidan to Cengkong suican kaoci congsi nasa toya pitademan a milinah to tadem ni Sugamiya Katsutarou i, itiya mapohed ko okak ato takenip masapinang itiya, awaayto ko kacipinangan : 447 Pikidatan
S.PHON: == so~u~u*amija katso~u~utaro~uo~u~u == so~u~u*amija katso~u~utaro~uo~u~u , ib~b~vara*ikən tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nao~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u siŋko~u sitiŋ (maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw no~u po~uso~uŋ) , po~uso~uŋ təɾəkaj iiŋ : ***, kakəriɬ~ɮan kaɾəkapo~uan no~u siŋko~u : **, misaʡiʦəɾ patirəŋ to~u minato~u no~u siŋko~u ato~u pipaɾaɾan : ***. ʡo~uripan maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi so~u~u*amija katso~u~utaro~uo~u~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i kamiso~u~u-sħi no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, **** miħəʦa miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ko~uno~uə ko~uħəi ɬ~ɮaitai saka * ħiko~utai, saka * miħəʦa mao~uʦo~ur maɾa riko~u~u*o~u~un ko~uħəi iʦħi to~uħəi, iko~ur maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan, mao~uʦo~ur tajra i ɬ~ɮairən, pjo~unʡjan itija . i **** miħəʦa maɾatapaŋ no~u ħitaj, to~uja miħəʦa mapakao~uɾaħ to~u saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ no~u mi*o~u~utakara ko~u~unsħ* o~u jo~u~ujo~u , i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ*): *** maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u iməŋ no~u piŋto~uŋ, **** miħəʦa maɾamiɬ~ɮamaan tapaŋ no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u iməŋ , saan itira i to~uŋkaŋ, aɾikaŋ, faŋsaŋ, ʦiasiən a kasasiikəɬ~ɮ no~u iməŋ, itira i nanʦə no~u takao~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mapaʦakat kəisatso~u~usħo~u : *** : ***, saan i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mapakao~uɾaħ to~u saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ no~u mi*o~u~utakara ko~u~unsħ* o~u jo~u~ujo~u . nano~uja i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u siŋko~u : *** , misaʡiʦəɾ misaɾaɾan nai siŋko~u taŋasa po~uso~uŋ a ɾaɾan, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kasanijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~u~umin patirəŋ to~u amo~uto~u a kajakaj, maɾaħəʦi i, pasiʡamis to~u tajra i kakaʦawan, kaɾaɬ~ɮo~ut a ɾaɾan : *** . nano~uja masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u no~u siŋko~u ʦi matso~u~ui kinjiro~u, fo~uɾaɾaʦaj ʦi o~u~uma sakaə ɬ~ɮo~u, po~usko~u ʦi mijaħara sa, matso~u~uo~u b~b~vo~u~un nanji a so~unʦħo~u maaini, nanaj mapaɾaɾan ko~u no~u tətso~u~uɬ~ɮo~u (ʦiɾamaɾaj) ɾaɾan taŋasa i siŋko~u, ato~u mapaɾaɾan miɾakəʦaj to~u ɾo~uto~uk a karo~umakatan ɾaɾan. o~unini a nisaħaɾakaan masafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u kafafaw itija, nika ʦiɬ~ɮəmak to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka ʦaajaj ka ɾaħəʦi ko~unini : ******* . i **** miħəʦa, ira ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u sapiɾinaħ ʦi so~u~u*amija katso~u~utaro~uo~u~u tajra i ro~uma nijaro~uʡ i, ʦaaj sakaɾinaħaw saka ɾijas sato~u ʦiŋra to~unini a tajaɾ, iko~ur no~u **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ : *** maparo~uʦək ʦiŋra maɾa ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u po~uso~uŋ təɾəkaj iiŋ : ***, saka itini sato~u i siŋko~u ko~u nikaʡo~urip : ***, itini i ʦo~uŋsanɾo~u mapatirəŋ ko~u ɾo~umaʡ : *******. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, miko~utaj ʦi o~ub~b~vi ħan jo~u sħima maɾaʦħan-ʦħan no~u siŋko~u . i **** miħəʦa aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ʦiŋra a mapataj, mapataj ʦiŋra miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u niro~uo~utan to~u kataɬ~ɮəm i siŋko~u, i **** miħəʦa o~u təɾo~uʦ niŋra tajniaj mitaʡo~uŋ to~u taɬ~ɮəm. i **** miħəʦa maɾo~upipatirəŋan to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan to~u ʦəŋko~uŋ so~u~uiʦan kao~uʦi ʦo~uŋsi nasa to~uja pitaɬ~ɮəman a miɾinaħ to~u taɬ~ɮəm ni so~u~u*amija katso~u~utaro~uo~u~u i, itija mapo~uħəɬ~ɮ ko~u o~ukak ato~u takənip masapinaŋ itija, awaajto~u ko~u kaʦipinaŋan : *** pikiɬ~ɮatan
